subcodes.first_line: In this day the Orient, Dawning-Place of the Manifestation and Rising-Point of Divine Revelation, hath appeared resplendent from the horizon of the heaven of God's bounty, yet the people of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مشرق مطلع ظهور و مطلع مشرق وحی از افق سماء عنایت الهی ظاهر و باهر ولکن اهل ارض
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
